channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: High Court confirms dismissal of terrorism charges against Kneecap rapper
item.description: The High Court has upheld the dismissal of a terrorism case against Liam Og Ó hAnnaidh, known professionally as Mo Chara, a member of the Belfast-based rap group Kneecap. The charges arose from an all...

item.title: 20-year-old charged following alleged Sydney tobacconist kidnapping
item.description: Police in Sydney have charged a 20-year-old man in connection with the alleged kidnapping of another man outside a local tobacconist. The incident has drawn public attention due to its sudden and alar...

item.title: Five Governors Still Outside APC Amid Party’s Control of 31 States
item.description: As di 2027 general election dey approach, di ruling All Progressives Congress (APC) don show say dem dey control 31 of Nigeria's 36 states because some opposition governors don waka join dem. But stil...

item.title: Tanzanian Ministers Briefed on Key SADC Regional Meetings in Pretoria
item.description: Tanzania’s Deputy Minister for Foreign Affairs and East African Cooperation, Dr Ngwaru Maghembe, together with Deputy Minister for Finance, Laurent Luswetula, have reached Pretoria, South Africa, to t...

item.title: China Restricts OpenClaw AI Use in Government and Financial Institutions Over Security Risks
item.description: Chinese authorities have begun restricting the use of OpenClaw AI applications within state-owned enterprises and government agencies, including major banks, due to concerns over data security and ext...

item.title: Sandiganbayan dismisses late appeal of former DOE officials in Malampaya fund scam case
item.description: The Sandiganbayan Third Division denied the motion for reconsideration filed by former Department of Energy (DOE) officials, including ex-Undersecretary Donato Marcos, who sought to dismiss their graf...

item.title: Evaluating the Evidence Behind Popular Fitness Trends
item.description: Social media has propelled numerous fitness trends into the mainstream, but not all are supported by robust scientific evidence. 'Japanese walking', which alternates brisk and gentle walking intervals...

item.title: Observing Five Years of Life Among Zambia’s Predators
item.description: For 1,400 days, a wildlife film crew immersed themselves in Zambia’s Nsefu sector, documenting lions, leopards, hyenas and wild dogs. What emerged was a study not only of survival but of social dynami...

item.title: How to know if it is baby blues or postpartum depression after childbirth
item.description: This article explains in a simple way the difference between normal baby blues and postpartum depression so that new mothers, their partners, and families can know when to relax and when to seek extra...

item.title: HSBC Strategist Advises Heavy Investment in Global Equities Amid Market Recovery
item.description: HSBC's chief multi-asset strategist, Max Kettner, has taken an extremely bullish stance on global equities, declaring a 'maximum overweight' position. He believes that the worst of market fears are be...

item.title: Montreal braces for incoming ice storm with safety warnings
item.description: Montreal is preparing for a significant ice storm expected to affect the city and surrounding areas. Residents are being urged to exercise caution as freezing rain and icy conditions could create haza...

item.title: CBN directs banks to carry out comprehensive stress test on credit portfolios from April
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) don give instruction say all banks for Naija go run thorough stress test on their credit portfolios starting from April 1, 2026. This na part of their routine regulat...

item.title: President Ruto Donates KSh 5 Million for Mwala TVC Bus to Support Students
item.description: Mwala MP Vincent Kawaya has urged Kenyans to fairly recognise President William Ruto's efforts in development, highlighting a recent donation of KSh 5 million to Mwala Technical and Vocational College...

item.title: Peru’s Rapid Presidential Changes Highlight Political and Social Fragmentation
item.description: Peru has witnessed a rapid turnover of presidents, with José Jerí being ousted by Congress after just four months in office, making him the third president since 2021 to be removed before completing h...

item.title: Preliminary Inquiry Finds US Mistakenly Struck Iranian School
item.description: A preliminary military investigation has found that the United States was responsible for a deadly missile strike on the Shajarah Tayyebeh elementary school in Minab, Iran, on 28 February. The strike,...

item.title: Foreign Hacker Accessed FBI Files Related to Jeffrey Epstein Investigation
item.description: In 2023, an unidentified foreign hacker managed to breach the FBI’s New York Field Office, targeting files associated with the Jeffrey Epstein investigation. According to Reuters, which cited sources ...

item.title: UK Recognises Tanzania’s Effective Response to Marburg Virus Outbreaks
item.description: BUKOBA: The United Kingdom High Commission has praised the Tanzanian government for its effective strategies and response to the Marburg virus disease outbreaks in Kagera Region. UK Deputy High Commis...

item.title: Van Crashes Into White House Barricade, Driver Arrested, No Injuries Reported
item.description: Early on Wednesday morning in Washington DC, a van drove into a temporary security barricade near the White House. The incident occurred at approximately 6:30 a.m. local time at the intersection of Co...

item.title: Elizabeth Means’ Senate Experience Highlights Respect and Equality Issues for Women Athletes
item.description: Last March 3, Elizabeth Means, an American basketball player seeking Filipino citizenship to play for Gilas Pilipinas Women, faced an uncomfortable moment in the Senate when Senator Jinggoy Estrada as...

item.title: YouTube Launches Pilot Program for Deepfake Detection Among Public Figures and Journalists
item.description: YouTube has announced an expansion of its AI-powered deepfake detection tools, extending them to a select group of politicians, government officials, and journalists. The aim of this pilot program is ...
